# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build script or commands to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Custom deployment commands to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for script execution'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
        default: 'development'
      notify_on_completion:
        description: 'Send notification on completion'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: true
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
    paths:
      - 'build-scripts/**'
      - 'deploy-scripts/**'

env:
  BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/artifacts
  LOG_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/logs

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Inputs
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    outputs:
      has_deploy: ${{ steps.check.outputs.has_deploy }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate inputs
        id: check
        run: |
          echo "=== Validation Phase ==="
          echo "Environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}"
          echo "Working Directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}"

          WORK_DIR="${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}"
          if [[ "$WORK_DIR" == *".."* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Working directory must not contain path traversal sequences (..)"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then
            echo "has_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "has_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          echo "Validation passed."

  build:
    name: Custom Build
    needs: validate
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 120
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup build environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR"
          mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"

          echo "=== System Information ==="
          echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
          echo "OS: $(uname -a)"
          echo "Date: $(date -u)"
          echo "User: $(whoami)"
          echo "Disk Space:"
          df -h .
          echo "Memory:"
          free -h || true
          echo "=========================="

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache
            ~/.npm
            ~/.m2
            ~/.gradle
            ~/go/pkg/mod
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/pom.xml', '**/build.gradle', '**/go.sum') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-

      - name: Execute custom build script
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        env:
          BUILD_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
          GITHUB_RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Starting Custom Build ==="
          echo "Environment: $BUILD_ENV"
          echo "Branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
          echo "Commit: $COMMIT_SHA"
          echo "Working Directory: $(pwd)"
          echo "=============================="

          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"

          if [ -z "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ] && [ -f "build-scripts/default-build.sh" ]; then
            echo "No build script provided, using default build script..."
            chmod +x build-scripts/default-build.sh
            bash build-scripts/default-build.sh 2>&1 | tee "$LOG_DIR/build.log"
          else
            echo "Executing custom build commands..."
            bash -c "$BUILD_SCRIPT" 2>&1 | tee "$LOG_DIR/build.log"
          fi

          BUILD_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "Build exited with code: $BUILD_EXIT_CODE"

          if [ $BUILD_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script failed with exit code $BUILD_EXIT_CODE"
            exit $BUILD_EXIT_CODE
          fi

      - name: Collect build artifacts
        if: always()
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Collecting Artifacts ==="
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -r dist/* "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          if [ -d "build" ]; then
            cp -r build/* "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          if [ -d "target" ]; then
            cp -r target/*.jar "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
            cp -r target/*.war "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          if [ -d "bin" ]; then
            cp -r bin/* "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          echo "Artifacts collected:"
          ls -la "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || echo "No artifacts found"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload build logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.LOG_DIR }}
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  deploy:
    name: Custom Deploy (${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }})
    needs: [validate, build]
    if: needs.validate.outputs.has_deploy == 'true'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 60
    environment:
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
          echo "=== Deployment Information ==="
          echo "Target Environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "================================"

      - name: Pre-deployment health check
        run: |
          echo "=== Pre-Deployment Health Check ==="
          echo "Checking system resources..."
          df -h .
          free -h || true
          echo "Pre-deployment checks passed."

      - name: Execute custom deploy script
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
          ARTIFACTS_PATH: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
          GITHUB_RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          DEPLOYER: ${{ github.actor }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Starting Custom Deployment ==="
          echo "Environment: $DEPLOY_ENV"
          echo "Deployer: $DEPLOYER"
          echo "==================================="

          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}"

          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ] && [ -f "deploy-scripts/deploy-${DEPLOY_ENV}.sh" ]; then
            echo "Using environment-specific deploy script..."
            chmod +x "deploy-scripts/deploy-${DEPLOY_ENV}.sh"
            bash "deploy-scripts/deploy-${DEPLOY_ENV}.sh" 2>&1 | tee "$LOG_DIR/deploy.log"
          else
            echo "Executing custom deploy commands..."
            bash -c "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" 2>&1 | tee "$LOG_DIR/deploy.log"
          fi

          DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "Deployment exited with code: $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE"

          if [ $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment script failed with exit code $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE"
            exit $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment health check
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Health Check ==="
          echo "Verifying deployment..."

          if [ -f "deploy-scripts/healthcheck.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x deploy-scripts/healthcheck.sh
            bash deploy-scripts/healthcheck.sh "${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}"
          else
            echo "No custom health check script found. Skipping."
          fi

          echo "Post-deployment checks completed."

      - name: Upload deployment logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.LOG_DIR }}
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  notify:
    name: Send Notifications
    needs: [build, deploy]
    if: |
      always() &&
      (github.event.inputs.notify_on_completion == 'true' || github.event.inputs.notify_on_completion == '')
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Determine overall status
        id: status
        run: |
          BUILD_RESULT="${{ needs.build.result }}"
          DEPLOY_RESULT="${{ needs.deploy.result }}"

          if [ "$BUILD_RESULT" == "failure" ] || [ "$DEPLOY_RESULT" == "failure" ]; then
            echo "overall=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=❌" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [ "$BUILD_RESULT" == "cancelled" ] || [ "$DEPLOY_RESULT" == "cancelled" ]; then
            echo "overall=cancelled" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=⚠️" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "overall=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=✅" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Create summary
        run: |
          echo "## ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }} Pipeline Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Overall Status** | \`${{ steps.status.outputs.overall }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Build Result** | \`${{ needs.build.result }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Deploy Result** | \`${{ needs.deploy.result }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Environment** | \`${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Branch** | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Commit** | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Triggered by** | @${{ github.actor }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Run ID** | [${{ github.run_id }}](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup
    needs: [build, deploy, notify]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Clean up workspace
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning up workspace ==="
          rm -rf "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -rf "$LOG_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true

          docker system prune -f 2>/dev/null || true

          echo "Cleanup completed."
